head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: E-52: EfficientNet-B0 + hard dense_fg_aux 30ep — does the E-51 8ep positive signal (+0.0090 pf_mIoU) survive 30ep training and beat E-40 (MV3-Small 30ep, 0.8564)? 2×2 design: backbone (MV3-Small vs EffB0) × epochs (8ep vs 30ep). E-51 lr=3e-4 + warmup=3 confirmed stable — same settings here. If pf_mIoU > E-40 (0.8564), EfficientNet-B0 is a validated mainline candidate. If pf_mIoU ≤ E-40 or NaN appears with extended training, MV3-Small hard dense_fg remains canonical.
